characters.name: Akemo Fukanaga
characters.description: "He is, after all, the son of my beloved sister, Akemo." —Grandfather Fukanaga Akemo Fukanagahas only ever been mentioned twice on the series, once as being the mother ofConnor Fukanaga, revealed recently to be the leader of the Ishina ninjas, and a second time by Conor asking her if dinner was ready at their new apartment, which he only did to trick Mike, Owen, and Amanda into thinking that he could not hang out with them. Given the fact that a sibling of Grandfather Fukanaga's has only recently come into immediate play, Akemo might be mentioned at some point later in the series, although that is currently unknown.

characters.name: Amanda McKay
characters.description: Amanda McKayis the tritagonist and the third main member of the "Supah Ninjas". She is a straight-A cheerleader and one of the most popular girls in school. However, all she really wants is to be more than some pretty cheerleader; she wants a sense of danger, and adventure, which is why she requested to joinMikeandOwen. She should never be underestimated and is out to prove that she's not just a typical good girl. Her family is wealthy as they own the chain of McKay Casinos. She is portrayed byGracie Dzienny. Amanda is generally accepting, down-to-earth and smart (since she is a scholar). She's commonly known as the good girl, and sometimes even a nerd—though her cheerleading life is often able to drown that part out. She's willing to show her rebellious side but is proud of who she is. A quirk she has is, before she's going to attack someone, she taps her right foot, as pointed out by Owen inMorningstar Academy. Another thing she hasn't been able to shake is how predictable she comes across. She is strict, prideful, not afraid of going with the blackmail method, and even has a side of sweetness. She is cunning and a quick thinker who is not afraid to make herself heard. TBA Amanda is generally accepting, down-to-earth and smart (since she is a scholar). She is cunning and a quick thinker who is not afraid to make herself heard.

characters.name: Arthur Vanderhauser
characters.description:
Arthur Vanderhauseris a character in the Supah Ninjas series. He is the father of Cameron Vanhauser, a character who returns to town after attending boarding school in London. Arthur is the head of the construction company Vanderhauser International.[3]
The show's plot involves a series of arson attacks on Vanderhauser International buildings, with Cameron initially suspected of being the arsonist. However, it is later revealed that Dr. Anten, also known as Komodo, is behind the attacks, seeking to eliminate Arthur and Cameron.

characters.name: Bethany
characters.description: Bethanyis a member of Morningstar Academy. While she tries to fight Amanda with Clarissa, Mike jumps on her, she is then knocked out unconscious for a certain period of time. Her weapons are her bangles that she throws. Amanda makes the comment that her bracelets are "so last year".

characters.name: Cameron
characters.description: I don't get it, why don't you want me? I'm handsome. —Cameron, "Detention" Cameron Vanderhausercomes from a very wealthy family. His father is the owner of Empire condominiums. He was introduced in the episode "Komodo". He apparently knows Amanda and is back from a al boys school in London.  Cameron isn't very fond of his father. He is captured by Komodo but rescued by the ninjas. He starts dating Amanda and proves to be a little bit of the jealous type when he starts to think Amanda has feelings for Owen in the episode "The Magnificient". Then in "Morningstar Academy" He and Amanda break up after he says that she isn't spontaneous. Then in "Detention" Cameron appears and has lost it. He stops taking care of himself and wants Amanda back. Amanda tells him that he'll find the right girl but it isn't her. Cameron is nice and thoughtful but clueless at times. He proves to never give up on Amanda when he asks Kelly how to win her back.
characters.personality_section: Cameron is nice and thoughtful but clueless at times. He proves to never give up on Amanda when he asks Kelly how to win her back.

characters.name: Checkmate (character)
characters.description: Nicholias Spaski (Checkmate).png Checkmateis a super mastermind who makes chess related clues and traps all over Empire city. His real name is Nicholias Spaski and was once a chess champion as a kid but in one round his opponent refused to quit when Nicholias was in a difficult move. This moment sent him into a mental breakdown, which resulted in him causing his opponent to "dissappear". From that day on he has been challenging people to a game of puzzles which almost every time resulting in him winning and the opponent losing. Checkmate was finally defeated on his giant chess board by Amanda when she refused to play on, which upset him and he threatened to kill Mike and Owen for not playing, but Mike escaped and beat him up. After one finally attempt to escape Mike grapple hooked him before he could parachute away. He is then seen again in the episode "Eternum". He is a inmate in the prison. Mike is captured by the doctor and about to be hypnotized and the only way to save him is to release all the prisoners by pulling the switch that checkmate told Amanda about but that will release checkmate too. She ends up doing so and Checkmate leaves with "Game on, ninjas!" written on the glass window. This is foreshadowing that he may return.

characters.name: Chop Shop
characters.description: Chop Shopis a mobster that has a crime ring and uses his garage as a cover.Flintsteals from him and wants revenge on him. He kidnappedAmandato get Flint to come back. He is defeated by the ninjas and Flint.

characters.name: Clarissa
characters.description:
Clarissais the main featured character fromMorningstar Academy. She is a villain who is portrayed byDaniella Monet. She wears lots of black eye makeup and has dark brown hair with pins in it that extend into lethal weapons. She is friends withFionaandBethany, the two other members of Morningstar Academy.
She dislikesAmandaand calls her "nerd" because she is really smart. She also smiles atCameronand he smiles back, making Amanda jealous.

characters.name: Collin Kirk
characters.description: Collin Kirkis an actor that became famous while one of his co-stars in college, (Limelight) didn't and because of this he is kidnapped. He is saved by the ninjas though. He is a actor and writer in a popular teen vampire series. Collin is only seen in one episode and his movies are never mentioned in future episodes.

characters.name: Connor Kumada
characters.description: Connor KumadaisMike'scousin. Played by Brandon Soo-Hoo Kagemaru FukanagaHe is the leader of theIshinaclan, who are a bunch of ninjas that crusades against the Fukanaga clan. Connor is Mikes cousin and one of the leader of the Ishina. He lives a double life. He is very good at combat as a ninja and he is always hanging around Mike, Amanda, and Owen. The ninjas find him annoying and always try to ditch him everywhere they go or when Mike's dad leaves him with them. Connor originally thinks that Mikes dad is a ninja but soon discovers Mike,Owen, andAmandaare actually the ninjas. He is obsessed with finding the Floating Sword. It is seen on the season finale that Connor has Mike's necklace and opens the dojo. Connor will probably be the main villain of the Supah Ninjas. The ninjas soon find out Connor is with the Ishina.  He and the Ishina are after the floating sword. Mike and Connor fight but Connor disappears with his grandfather taking away Mike's mon necklace. He goes into the dojo and begins to look for the Floating Sword. He begins to be trapped by the gates which begin to close and reopen rapidly. Amanda begins to fight him but Connor runs away when Mike lets the sewer smell in. The ninjas find him again and begin to battle but stop when Connor needs his inhaler. Connor tells them that he needs the floating sword to rescue his parents. It turns out to be a lie because while entering a building Connor betrays the ninjas to fight with the Ishina. He admits his parents are being held hostage by the Ishina. The ninjas defeat the Ishina and put Conor in a box that ships him all the way to Madagascar. Like Mike he also has a mon but instead of it being sliver it is gold with the Ishina symbol on it.After the fight he was sent toMadagascarin a shipping crate.

characters.name: Dollhouse (character)
characters.description: Dollhousewas a crazy teenage doll collector who talks to dolls, kidnaps people and uses a mind control device in order to turn them into human dolls. It was revealed that he had a 'play mate' before saying that his mum 'never let' him have one resulting in his need for dolls because they were his 'friends.' He was the son of the very famous toy maker Mr. Spielmacher and his hide out was inside the old Spielmacher. He was final brought down by Mike after Mike was chased by his 'dolls' into a room in the giant doll house, he tried to fire a knockout dart at Mike but Mike deflected it back at Dollhouse Knocking him out. He uses his human dolls to attack people and he uses collars to control his victims.

characters.name: Dr. Eternum
characters.description: Dr. Eternum's goal is to switch peoples personality form evil to good by using the zodiac symbol for the twins "Gemini". Gemini are two twins and in this case the two are good and evil. Dr. Eternum finds out about the ninjas fromCheckmateand sends for them to come to him. He sends for them by having one of the ex-inmates write ninja in Japanese kanji. He finds the ninjas and makes his guards get them so he can hypnotizes them too.MikeandOwenmanage to escape before they are caught. Dr. Eternum captures Mike though and hypnotizes him to be evil and good.When he finally captures Owen andAmandahe has Mike attack them thinking that he is hypnotized. Mike however isn't effected by the hypnosis it might be because Amanda turned the power off early. The ninjas defeat him and his guards. He is then sent to jail. The machine he uses to hypnotise the people, his guards, and the word "Gemini". He has no power without any of his technology or guards. He fights with his hand but is captured afterwards.

characters.name: Dr. Warner
characters.description: This is Quinton's favortie scientist, Dr. Warner, who appeared in the episodeKid Q. He is nasty to his workers and other contestants in the Science Fair. He even rolls over his assitants'Westlysfoot a number of times. This causes his science assistant to turn against him. He awards the prize toQuintonfor best invention at the end of the episode.

characters.description: Fionais one of the criminal girls from theMorningstar Academycrew. Her weapons are two paper fans. After she foughtAmanda, she was defeated and Amanda disguised herself as Fiona. Amanda as Fiona

characters.name: Flint Forster
characters.description: Flint Forsteris an anti-hero that steals from the rich and gives to charity, kind of like Robin Hood. Flint has a whole group that helps him. He seems to have an interest in Amanda. He leaves Amanda his necklace before escaping. Flint and Amanda will meet again at a debate and connect in "Finding Forster,". She teaches him to fight bad guys. She also finds out that he is rich and goes to a private school.  He finds out Amanda's real identity. They meet again in "Spring Fling". He asks her to the dance and if she would go to Paris with him for the summer. She rejects him. He finds out Owen and Mike's real identities.

characters.name: Gina (Wall Flower)
characters.description: We've been in the same class since kindergarten! —Gina WallFlower Gina had a crush on Owen but when he began hanging out withPaloma, it was shown that she's evil and jealous. When she kidnapped Owen, she told him that the greenhouse plants didn't find her invisible like he did and that they would be together forever.

characters.name: Gordon
characters.description: Gordonis a minor character in Supah Ninjas. He served as the District Attorney of Empire City. Fifteen years before the events of the series, Gordon prosecuted a notorious thief named Frankie Fellows, who had been apprehended by officers Jerry and Martin Fukanaga. Frankie was sentenced to 15 years in prison, and the Mayor publicly praised all three men for their roles in the case. Fifteen years later, while campaigning for re-election, Gordon walks into a bank and accidentally bumps into someone who looks exactly like him. As they collide, both drop their bags. In the confusion, the doppelgänger swaps bags with Gordon, then quickly apologizes and walks off, leaving Gordon confused. Moments later, the police arrive at the scene. Mike Fukanaga and his new partner, Grasso, arrest Gordon and confiscate the bag—only to find it filled with stolen money. Gordon insists the bag isn’t his. Grasso coldly tells him to 'take it up with the District Attorney.' But Martin, now older and more seasoned, corrects him: 'He is the District Attorney.' The revelation leaves everyone stunned and unsure of what just happened.

The revelation leaves everyone stunned and unsure of what just happened.

characters.name: Hakaisha
characters.description: Hakaishais a robot that killsYamato, temporarily, in the episode "The Ishina Strike Back". It is owned byKagema Fukanaga. This robot was determined to find the floating sword but failed its mission by being attacked briefly by Yamato. Next, Hakaisha was defeated by the ninjas but not before Kagema could temporarily destroy the dojo.

characters.name: Isabelle
characters.description: Isabellewas an undercover detective that was investigating the attack in Benjamin Rush High School. So far she only appeared in the episode "Skeleton Crew". She was pretending to date Owen who thinks he and MIke and Amanda are the criminals. Isabelle is a character who appears in the Supah Ninjas episode "Skeleton Crew". She is introduced as a new junior transfer student at Benjamin Rush High School.

characters.name: Jellyface (character)
characters.description: Jellyface posing asMartin Fukanaga Jellyfaceis the eigth documented villain faced by the Supah Ninjas, and is one of the most clever villains they've ever faced. Jellyface commits crime with the use of Plasma 17, a restricted gel which immediately forms into a perfect resemblance of anyone who touches it. Jellyface uses these guidelines to construct costumes, and uses these for whatever nefarious purposes he desires. Jellyface's true identity is Franklin (Frankie) Fellows, one of Martin Fukanaga's first big arrests as a police officer, and he has risen again to take the ultimate revenge on those who were responsible for his incarceration. These men are Martin Fukanaga, his old friend Reggie, the mayor of Empire City, and an attorney who was presumably responsible for the conviction. Jellyface got both the attorney and Reggie arrested by creating likenesses of them with the Plasma and then committing crimes so that the real men would get arrested. He planned to kill Martin and the mayor by kidnapping them and tying them up in a clock tower at city hall, where an enormous celebration is being held in honor of the conviction of Fellows himself. However, the Ninjas foil the attempt by busting in in the nick of time, with Owen and Amanda stopping the bomb and Mike taking on Jellyface (disguised as Martin Fukanaga as a cover), ultimately defeating him.

characters.description: Jellyface posing asMartin Fukanaga Jellyfaceis the eigth documented villain faced by the Supah Ninjas, and is one of the most clever villains they've ever faced. Jellyface commits crime with the use of Plasma 17, a restricted gel which immediately forms into a perfect resemblance of anyone who touches it. Jellyface uses these guidelines to construct costumes, and uses these for whatever nefarious purposes he desires. Jellyface's true identity is Franklin (Frankie) Fellows, one of Martin Fukanaga's first big arrests as a police officer, and he has risen again to take the ultimate revenge on those who were responsible for his incarceration. These men are Martin Fukanaga, his old friend Reggie, the mayor of Empire City, and an attorney who was presumably responsible for the conviction. Jellyface got both the attorney and Reggie arrested by creating likenesses of them with the Plasma and then committing crimes so that the real men would get arrested. He planned to kill Martin and the mayor by kidnapping them and tying them up in a clock tower at city hall, where an enormous celebration is being held in honor of the conviction of Fellows himself. However, the Ninjas foil the attempt by busting in in the nick of time, with Owen and Amanda stopping the bomb and Mike taking on Jellyface (disguised as Martin Fukanaga as a cover), ultimately defeating him.

characters.name: Jerry
characters.description: Jerryis a minor character in Supah Ninjas. He wasMartin'sformer partner on the Empire City Police Department and is now retired. He also serves asMike'shonorary uncle in the series. When the Supah Ninjas encountered a robber on the rooftop they discovered Mike's uncle Jerry, Mike throws a shuriken at the thief, it nick him but didn't cut him, the robber notice it but bruishes off and clashes with the Ninjas with a ladder, Jerry is shown to have self defense moves that able to defeat the Ninjas and escape.

characters.name: Kagemaru Fukanaga
characters.description: He's a zombie! —Owen Reynolds Kagemaru Fukanagais the mysterious  older twin brother ofHattori Fukanaga. He is the leader ofThe Ishinaclan, and trying to bring down theFukanaga Clan. He is looking for the floating sword. He has arobotthat he plans to unleash on the ninjas as soon as he finds the floating sword. In the episode "The Ishina Strike Back" He destroys the dojo because his brother will not tell him where the floating sword is.
